title: Stasis
description: A simple, yet useful mod that captures the vanilla-stasis chamber into a single block. This block can be activated with a remote. And you can link this remote to any stasis chamber across the map, no matter the dimension or location.
body:
# Stasis

A simple quality of life mod that teleports you to the stasis chamber you have linked to your portable stasis remote. **Captures an entire stasis chamber in a single block** and lets you teleport to it across dimensions, from anywhere. To link a stasis chamber you right-click the stasis chamber while holding the remote item. **Allows stasis chambers in singleplayer worlds**. Also works great on multiplayer worlds. After using your stasis remote it will take the ender pearl from your stasis chamber, **you will have to reload it by right clicking with another ender pearl**. You can also **use a stasis upgrade on your stasis chamber to give it infinite ender pearls** and you will never have to reload again.![Stasis Chamber](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7cdce181df409be4b3e052ef7d99ef922c9168d.png)
